title: eltroplectris travassosii
intro: Eltroplectris travassosii, also known as the Travassos' Eltroplectris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eltroplectris travassosii include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, Eltroplectris travassosii is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, and is used to treat various health conditions.
